series_metadata.series_description: Floor plans for State-owned or leased property, including work stations and floor arrangements. Used for logistical purposes and future planning projects.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until revised, superceded or scanned. Dispose of last version when no longer occupying facility or when scanned. ; Electronic: Retain until revised or superseded. Dispose of last version when no longer occupying facility., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
